summary: Comprehensive smoke test of Tax Office CRM Portal completed successfully. All core functionality including booking flow, dashboard navigation, PDF generation, and brand settings working correctly. Backend APIs 100% functional.
passed_tests: ✅ BOOKING FLOW: Complete 4-step process (service selection → date/time → client info → confirmation)
✅ DASHBOARD: Login and navigation to appointment/case details working
✅ RECENT APPOINTMENTS: Clickable rows navigate to /portal/appointments/:id
✅ RECENT CASES: Clickable rows navigate to /portal/cases/:id
✅ PDF GENERATION: All three endpoints (case, client, appointment) return 200 with correct content-type
✅ BRAND SETTINGS: Configuration propagates to public booking page
✅ EMAIL REMINDER: Backend confirmation of reminder_sent_48h field in appointments
✅ PUBLIC BOOKING: Complete booking submission creates appointment and case
✅ BILINGUAL SUPPORT: EN/ES language toggle functional
✅ BACKEND HEALTH: All 17 API tests passed (100% success rate)
✅ AUTHENTICATION: Login/logout and JWT token handling working
✅ DASHBOARD STATS: Total clients, active clients, today's appointments, pending cases displayed
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (17/17 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (core flows working, minor session management in extended testing)
